title: Sensex Hits Lifetime Highs Amid Global Market Rally
author: Markets Bureau
content: Mumbai: The Indian equity market benchmarks climbed to fresh all-time highs on Tuesday, tracking strong positive cues from global markets and sustained buying by domestic institutional investors.

The 30-share BSE Sensex jumped over 400 points to cross a new psychological milestone, while the broader NSE Nifty also reached uncharted territory. Gains were broad-based, with the IT, banking, and auto sectors leading the charge.

Market sentiment was bolstered by softer-than-expected inflation data from the US, which fueled hopes of an impending interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve. ‘The combination of strong domestic macro fundamentals and a favorable global setup is driving this rally,’ noted a senior market analyst.

Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs) also turned net buyers, adding momentum to the upmove. Retail participation remains robust, reflected in the strong inflows into systematic investment plans (SIPs).
